/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX15.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.1 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/test_space_packet.dir/tests/test_space_packet.cpp.o -o test_space_packet  libccsds_core.a
